hero.label: Data & AI Engineer
hero.tagline: Based in Paris · Open to opportunities
typewriter: I turn raw data into decisions.
I engineer AI pipelines at scale.

about.title: About me
bio: I'm a Data & AI Engineer based in Paris, designing data pipelines and machine learning systems that ship to production — from prototype to scale.
My work blends software engineering, cloud infrastructure (GCP, AWS) and applied AI, with a particular focus on LLMs, data orchestration and distributed architectures.
I trained between France and Ireland, which gave me a pragmatic, collaborative way of working with technical teams.
Today I'm looking to apply these skills with teams that want to turn data into measurable impact.
